text: I feel a sense of curious detachment, observing groups of people gathered and mingling under soft, almost theatrical light. There is an air of anticipation, but I am set apart, both participant and observer. The nearness of others and the vibrant, text-covered walls seem to press questions upon me: How am I different from those I watch? What threads of meaning tie us together in this shared space? I am quietly contemplative, alert to nuance, freshly aware of my place within this orchestrated gathering.
